title: Beautiful Ones
why_this_song: Beautiful Ones by Suede (1996) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 9 times; first heard in: "The beautiful ones"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "The beautiful ones"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Psycho for drum machine"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "Shaking their bits to the hits"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And if your baby's going crazy"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "beautiful" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "beautiful" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "ones" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "ones" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: Oh, high on diesel and gasoline
Hung around, stoned in a lonely town

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: La, la, la, la, la, la, la, oh

exercises.prompt_en: If you could ask Suede one question about "Beautiful Ones", what would it be and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse perguntar uma coisa para Suede sobre "Beautiful Ones", o que seria e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Beautiful Ones" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Beautiful Ones" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Beautiful Ones" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Beautiful Ones" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
